name: payments
context: Stripe payment processing — one-time charges, payment intents, and refunds
info: Handles the full payment flow: create PaymentIntents, confirm payments, process refunds, handle disputes. Supports card, bank transfer, and wallet payment methods. Includes 3D Secure handling and SCA compliance.

scripts.name: Create Payment Intent
scripts.description: Create a Stripe PaymentIntent for a charge
